subject: fix(theme): replace color: white with DaisyUI -content tokens
body:
Every element using a DaisyUI semantic background color now uses its
matching -content token for text instead of hardcoded white. This
ensures correct contrast in all themes (e.g., pastel primary is light
purple — white text on it would have poor contrast).

Fixes: app-alpha-badge, btn-update-banner, view-switcher-tab.active,
qb-mode-toggle.active, qb-logic-toggle:hover, qb-mode-btn.active,
qb-negate-btn.active, query-help-tab.active, install step counter.

Tags: theme, daisyui, contrast, a11y
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
